description.overview: The 'Toller' is the smallest retriever but packed with energy and intelligence. They were bred to lure and retrieve waterfowl with their playful antics.
description.history: The Nova Scotia Duck Tolling Retriever originated in Canada.
description.temperament: Known for being intelligent, alert, affectionate.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The 'Toller' is the smallest retriever but packed with energy and intelligence. They were bred to lure and retrieve waterfowl with their playful antics.
